title: Acceptance Receipt
description: Signed artifact-of-artifacts closing a verification cycle. References a Proof Pack by hash and records the verification verdict.

pack_id.description: The pack_id from the verified Proof Pack.

pack_root_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the JCS-canonical attestation (== pack_root_sha256 from manifest).

attestation_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the JCS-canonical attestation. Must equal pack_root_sha256 (D12 invariant).

claim_set_hash.description: Hash of the claim set used during verification.

exit_code.description: Assay exit code: 0=both pass, 1=integrity pass + claims fail, 2=integrity fail.

ci_binding.description: CI binding passthrough from the verified pack's attestation. Null if pack was built locally.

issued_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this receipt was issued.

signer.description: Identity of the entity that issued this receipt.

signer_pubkey.description: Base64-encoded Ed25519 public key used to verify signature.

pubkey_fingerprint.description: SHA-256 fingerprint of the signer's public key.

signature.description: Base64-encoded Ed25519 signature over JCS-canonical receipt body (all fields except signer.signature).
